proposal1.heroHeadline: McCreight is losing $150,000 annually on manual proposal creation. Here's where it drains away.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Manually drafting proposals eats up your valuable time. Our AI system creates them in just 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Each problem below represents a continuous loss for McCreight.

problems.title: Time Drain
problems.description: Spending 10 hours a week on proposals means 520 hours a year not spent on client engagement. At $300 per hour, that's $156,000 gone.

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: Every proposal inconsistently branded risks your reputation. A single misstep can cost a $50,000 contract.

problems.title: Lost Deals
problems.description: Taking 3 days to respond with a proposal could mean losing a deal worth $100,000 to a faster competitor.

problems.title: Employee Burnout
problems.description: Repetitive tasks demoralize your team. Employee turnover for McCreight's skilled consultants costs $20,000 per hire.

problems.title: Missed Opportunities
problems.description: Failing to send proposals for all inquiries means $200,000 in missed opportunities each year.

problems.title: Errors and Revisions
problems.description: Errors in proposals lead to 20% more back-and-forth communication. This costs an additional $25,000 annually in wasted effort.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Introducing our AI system as the definitive solution to these ongoing losses.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, creating a proposal takes hours of manual work. The system does it in 47 seconds, freeing up your time.

solutions.title: Brand Consistency
solutions.description: Inconsistencies slip through with manual efforts. The system ensures every proposal is perfectly branded every time.

solutions.title: Immediate Client Engagement
solutions.description: Waiting days for a proposal means lost deals. With the system, you're first to respond, securing more contracts.

solutions.title: Team Satisfaction
solutions.description: Manual proposal writing frustrates your team. The system automates the process, keeping your team motivated and focused.

solutions.title: Error-Free Proposals
solutions.description: Manual errors lead to costly revisions. Automated proposals reduce errors, saving time and money.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for McCreight's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for McCreight around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for McCreight.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Transform Acme Corp's Business with Strategic Implementation.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: Let's enhance your operational efficiency and deliver measurable outcomes through innovative strategy execution.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently losing potential revenue due to operational inefficiencies.

problems.title: Conversion Drop
problems.description: Every visitor leaving without purchasing is a missed opportunity. This represents a 20% revenue loss monthly.

problems.title: High Churn Rate
problems.description: Customers leaving after their first purchase lead to a 15% decrease in potential lifetime value.

problems.title: Inefficient Processes
problems.description: Manual operations slow down productivity, causing a 12% dip in output efficiency.

problems.title: Market Position Erosion
problems.description: Without distinct competitive positioning, Acme risks losing 10% market share annually.

problems.title: Low Employee Engagement
problems.description: Poor engagement results in 30% higher turnover, escalating recruitment and training costs.

problems.title: Inconsistent Brand Messaging
problems.description: Lack of clear messaging leads to a 25% decrease in brand recognition and customer loyalty.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our tailored solutions address these challenges head-on to stop the financial bleeding.

solutions.title: Strategic Planning
solutions.description: Enhances conversion rates by identifying and implementing effective strategies.

solutions.title: Change Management
solutions.description: Reduces churn by aligning organizational processes with customer needs.

solutions.title: Process Optimization
solutions.description: Improves operational efficiency, increasing productivity by streamlining workflows.

solutions.title: Brand Strategy
solutions.description: Strengthens market position by clarifying and amplifying brand messaging.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: McCreight brings unique expertise in strategy implementation with a playful yet corporate approach.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Track Record
whyUsCards.description: Successfully implemented strategies for various industries, ensuring tangible results.

whyUsCards.title: Tailored Solutions
whyUsCards.description: We customize our approach to fit your specific business needs and objectives.

whyUsCards.title: Dedicated Partnership
whyUsCards.description: Our team becomes an extension of yours, working collaboratively to achieve success.

whyUsCards.title: Insightful Analysis
whyUsCards.description: We provide in-depth insights to inform strategic decisions and drive growth.

proposal2.teamIntro: Meet the team that's ready to transform Acme Corp.

team.name: John Mccreight
team.bio: John leads our strategy and client relationships with expertise and dedication. He ensures every partnership is a step towards success.

proposal2.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Discovery & Analysis
process.description: We dive into your business to understand challenges and opportunities.

process.title: Strategy Development
process.description: Crafting a strategy that aligns with your business goals.

process.title: Implementation
process.description: Executing the strategy with precision and focus.

process.title: Review & Adjust
process.description: Evaluating progress and making necessary adjustments.

proposal2.pricingIntro: Choose the investment option that best aligns with your growth ambitions.

pricing.name: Basic Package
pricing.description: For startups looking to establish a foundational strategy.

pricing.name: Growth Package
pricing.description: Recommended for businesses poised for growth.

pricing.name: Enterprise Package
pricing.description: For large corporations needing comprehensive strategy solutions.

proposal2.ctaDescription: We'd love to explore how we can work together. No strings attached.

lead.company_description:
McCreightPartners collaborates with our clients' leaders worldwide, designing and implementing large-scale, strategic change. We apply time-tested methodologies developed during hundreds of engagements, years of experience, and knowledge gleaned through substantial investments in specialized research.

McCreight & Company was incorporated in 1983 by John McCreight, a management consultant in public practice since 1968. McCreight & Company, with our three sister firms:  CIO Group, Board Effectiveness Partners, and Second Opinion, is focused on partnering with our client leaders to design and guide the implementation of sound, sustainable, and competitively superior strategic change.

Want to learn more? http://implementstrategy.com/our-firms/
lead.headline: Founder And Chairman
lead.company_technologies: ai, android, apache, barracuda networks, flutter, godaddy hosting, gravity forms, intuit, microsoft office 365, mobile friendly, outlook, proofpoint, python, render, reviews, sharepoint, wordpress.org
lead.keywords: management consulting, strategic planning, strategy, management, performance improvement, mergers, acquisitions, results delivery, organization, business consulting & services
lead.personalization: You’ve got over 100 Alliance Partners with just 11 on your team, that’s quite a setup.
